holdings.infoBox: GFLW is an equity ETF with a total of 102 individual holdings. The top holdings are Sandisk stock at 7.33%, Lam Research at 3.74%, NVIDIA at 3.47%, Broadcom at 3.43%, and Applied Materials at 3.36%.

overview.description: The VictoryShares Free Cash Flow Growth ETF (GFLW) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Victory Free Cash Flow Growth index. The fund tracks an index composed of 100 US large-cap growth companies selected based on positive free cash flow trend, earnings, and ROI. Holdings are weighted in the portfolio based on a combination of free cash flow and momentum. GFLW was launched on Dec 3, 2024 and is issued by VictoryShares.
